rows.question: Can I host a green or eco-conscious event here?
rows.answer: Yes, absolutely! Many of our properties are surrounded by nature and are ideal for eco-conscious gatherings. We recommend discussing specific needs with our team for tailored setups.

rows.question: Is transportation available to farmhouses near the city?
rows.answer: While transportation isn’t included, our support team can guide you with basic directions or suggestions if needed. We recommend arranging your own travel for convenience.

rows.question: Are outdoor movie screenings possible at these farmhouses?
rows.answer: Yes! Some properties offer spacious lawns perfect for outdoor screenings. Be sure to check the specific listing or speak to our team to confirm this setup.

rows.question: How many guests can I invite for a private event?
rows.answer: This varies by property. Smaller venues may accommodate 15–20 guests, while larger ones can host over 100. You can refer to the property details or reach out to us for help.

rows.question: What’s included in the home theatre setup at Instafarms?
rows.answer: Most home theatre setups include a projector, screen, sound system, and cozy seating. Inclusions may vary slightly across farmhouses—check individual listings for specifics.

rows.question: Can I stream Netflix or OTT platforms in the home theatre?
rows.answer: Yes, most setups support streaming platforms like Netflix and Prime Video. Just ensure you’re logged into your own accounts when using them.

rows.question: How many people can sit in the theatre room?
rows.answer: Typically, 6 to 15 people can sit comfortably depending on the farmhouse. Please check the individual listing for seating capacity.

rows.question: Is there a separate space for elderly family members?
rows.answer: Yes, many properties have quiet, accessible indoor spaces ideal for elderly guests. Let us know if you have specific needs, and we’ll help you choose accordingly.

rows.question: What makes your luxury farmhouses unique?
rows.answer: Each farmhouse is handpicked for its unique vibe—whether it’s scenic views, curated interiors, or premium amenities like private pools and home theatres.

rows.question: Do you offer poolside dining or party setups?
rows.answer: While Instafarms doesn’t provide setup services, many properties have poolside spaces where you can arrange your own dining or party setup. The feasibility depends on the property—feel free to check with our team for guidance.

rows.question: What safety measures are in place around the pool?
rows.answer: Most pools are fenced or have clear boundaries. We also recommend adult supervision for children. Please check individual listings or consult our team for more details.

rows.question: Are there indoor sports or just outdoor games?
rows.answer: Many farmhouses offer both—like indoor board games or table tennis, along with cricket, badminton, and volleyball outdoors. Amenities vary per property.

rows.question: Do you offer event decoration for poolside setups?
rows.answer: Instafarms doesn’t directly provide event decoration, but some properties may offer it or allow you to bring in your own decorators. This varies from farmhouse to farmhouse, so we recommend checking the individual property details or reaching out to our support team for guidance.

rows.question: Can I rent just the banquet hall without booking a farmhouse?
rows.answer: At select properties, yes. Reach out to us with your location and date, and we’ll let you know what’s possible.

rows.question: How can I find a farmhouse near my desired location?
rows.answer: You can explore our All Locations page or reach out to us directly. We’ll help you shortlist options based on your preferred area.

rows.question: Do all locations offer the same amenities?
rows.answer: Not exactly. While many core features are common (like pools or lawns), amenities like theatres or indoor games vary by property. Always check individual listings for details.

rows.question: How do I check the availability of a farmhouse in a specific location?
rows.answer: Each listing has an option to check availability. Or, you can message us with your preferred dates and location—we’ll get back quickly.

rows.question: How can I contact Instafarms for more information about a specific location?
rows.answer: You can WhatsApp or call us directly. Our team is happy to help you with any property-specific queries.

rows.question: Which locations are best for pool parties?
rows.answer: Locations like Moinabad, Shankarpally, and Shamshabad often feature great pool party venues. Let us know your guest count, and we’ll suggest the perfect spot.

rows.question: Are the farmhouses in each location pet-friendly?
rows.answer: Many are! But pet policies vary, so it's best to check the listing or ask us directly before booking.

rows.question: Can I book multiple farmhouses in the same location for a larger group?
rows.answer: Yes, this is possible in locations where we have multiple properties nearby. Contact us with your group size, and we’ll coordinate accordingly.

rows.question: Which farmhouse locations are the most budget-friendly?
rows.answer: Most locations have budget-friendly options—it depends on the property. You can explore listings on our website or reach out to our team for suggestions.

rows.question: How can I find a farmhouse near my desired location?
rows.answer: You can explore our All Locations page or reach out to us directly. We’ll help you shortlist options based on your preferred area.

rows.answer: FAQ1
